title: Oil prices rise as traders eye fragile US-Iran ceasefire
summary: Oil prices fell on Wednesday following the announcement of a US-Iran ceasefire deal that includes reopening the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global crude supply route. This matters because disruptions to the strait significantly impact energy markets and global trade.
content: The cost of crude plunged on Wednesday after a deal was announced that includes the opening of the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 油价上涨，交易员关注美伊脆弱停火协议
zh.summary: 美伊停火协议宣布后，油价于周三下跌，该协议包括重新开放霍尔木兹海峡这一关键的全球原油供应路线。这很重要，因为海峡中断会对能源市场和全球贸易产生重大影响。

title: Europe stocks rebound to stall as U.S-Iran ceasefire comes under strain
summary: European stock markets are expected to open with mixed results as the recently agreed US-Iran ceasefire already shows signs of strain. This matters because geopolitical tensions significantly impact financial markets and investor confidence.
content: Shares in Europe are poised to open in mixed territory on Thursday, as the fragile truce agreed between the U.S. and Iran already shows signs of strain.

zh.title: 美伊停火协议面临压力，欧洲股市反弹停滞
zh.summary: 随着最近达成的美伊停火协议已经出现压力迹象，欧洲股市预期将以混合结果开盘。这很重要，因为地缘政治紧张局势对金融市场和投资者信心产生重大影响。

title: The food waste 'saints' feeding city's children
summary: Volunteers at the I Am Reusable food bank redistribute surplus food to schools, addressing food insecurity and waste in their community. This matters as a grassroots solution to childhood food security and environmental sustainability.
content: Janet Leng and Marian Hodgson volunteer at I Am Reusable food bank and redistribute food to schools.

zh.title: 食物浪费的"圣人"喂养城市儿童
zh.summary: "我是可重用"食物银行的志愿者将剩余食物重新分配给学校，解决其社区中的食物不安全和浪费问题。这很重要，因为这是一个解决儿童粮食安全和环保持续性的基层解决方案。

title: From war to weather: A 'super El Niño' event poses fresh risks to global food costs
summary: An unusually powerful El Niño weather event could emerge later in 2026, potentially worsening global food security and raising food costs. This matters because climate patterns directly impact agricultural production and food accessibility worldwide.
content: An unusually powerful El Niño weather event could take shape later this year, exacerbating global food security fears.

zh.title: 从战争到天气：强劲的厄尔尼诺事件对全球粮食成本构成新风险
zh.summary: 异常强劲的厄尔尼诺气候事件可能在2026年晚些时候出现，可能导致全球粮食安全恶化并提高粮食成本。这很重要，因为气候模式直接影响农业生产和全球粮食获取。

title: Trump says U.S. ready for 'next conquest,' warns military to remain near Iran until 'real agreement' is honored
summary: President Trump warned the military to maintain presence near Iran one day after the US and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire brokered by Pakistan, signaling potential continued tensions. This matters because it raises questions about the durability of the diplomatic agreement.
content: The statement came a day after Washington and Tehran agreed to a two-week ceasefire brokered by Pakistan, which halted six weeks of fighting.

zh.title: 特朗普称美国为"下一场征服"做好准备，警告军队在"真实协议"得到兑现之前留在伊朗附近
zh.summary: 在美国和伊朗同意由巴基斯坦斡旋的两周停火协议一天后，特朗普总统警告军队保持在伊朗附近，表明可能继续存在紧张关系。这很重要，因为它引发了对外交协议持久性的质疑。

title: Oil prices resume gains after Iran accuses U.S. of breaching ceasefire deal
summary: Oil prices rose after Iran accused the US of violating elements of their ceasefire agreement, adding uncertainty to the fragile truce. This matters because energy markets are highly sensitive to geopolitical tensions and supply threats.
content: Oil markets rose after Iran accused the United States of violating elements of a two-week ceasefire agreement.

zh.title: 伊朗指责美国违反停火协议后，油价恢复上升
zh.summary: 伊朗指责美国违反停火协议的条款后，油价上升，为脆弱的停火增加了不确定性。这很重要，因为能源市场对地缘政治紧张局势和供应威胁高度敏感。

title: Iran oil shock stirs memories of 1997 Asian Financial Crisis — but here’s why history may not repeat itself
summary: The Iran-related disruption to the Strait of Hormuz is straining Asian economies through rising energy costs and weakening currencies, though analysts believe a repeat of the 1997 Asian Financial Crisis is unlikely. This matters because it shows both real economic impact and structural market differences.
content: The Hormuz disruption is hammering Asian economies with surging energy costs and weakening currencies, but a repeat of the crisis three decades ago is unlikely.

zh.title: 伊朗油价冲击引发1997年亚洲金融危机的回忆——但为什么历史可能不会重演
zh.summary: 伊朗相关的霍尔木兹海峡中断正在通过不断上升的能源成本和货币贬值来削弱亚洲经济，尽管分析师认为1997年亚洲金融危机不太可能重演。这很重要，因为它展示了真实的经济影响和结构性的市场差异。

title: 'Poorly run, piece of ice': Trump targets Greenland again as Iran war deepens NATO rift
summary: President Trump has renewed interest in acquiring Greenland while criticizing NATO, as the Iran conflict has exposed divisions within the security alliance. This matters because it highlights internal tensions affecting Western security cooperation.
content: Trump has set his eyes on Greenland again while venting frustration at NATO, as the diplomatic fallout from Iran war exposed rifts in the security alliance.

zh.title: "管理不善，冰雪之地"：特朗普再次瞄准格陵兰，伊朗战争加深北约分裂
zh.summary: 特朗普总统在批评北约的同时重新对收购格陵兰表示兴趣，因为伊朗冲突暴露了安全联盟内部的分歧。这很重要，因为它突出了影响西方安全合作的内部紧张关系。

title: Asia markets open mixed as investors assess fragile Iran-U.S. ceasefire deal
summary: Iran's parliamentary speaker alleged the U.S. breached the two-week ceasefire agreement, raising concerns about the deal's stability just hours after it was announced as Asian markets responded with mixed trading.
content: Iran's parliamentary speaker charged the U.S. of breaching the terms of the two-week ceasefire agreement.

zh.title: 伊朗-美国停火协议不稳定，亚洲股市涨跌互现
zh.summary: 伊朗议会主席指责美国违反了为期两周的停火协议，在协议宣布仅几小时后就引发了对协议稳定性的担忧，亚洲股市对此做出了混合的交易反应。

title: Inside India newsletter: Tariffs and Iran war threaten India's $100 billion garments export goal
summary: U.S. tariffs and the Iran conflict have severely impacted India's garment industry, driving up production costs and threatening the sector's $100 billion export target.
content: U.S. tariffs and the Iran war have battered India’s garment industry, raising costs, hitting exports, and dashing hopes of a recovery.

zh.title: 印度快讯：关税和伊朗战争威胁印度1000亿美元服装出口目标
zh.summary: 美国关税和伊朗冲突严重冲击了印度服装业，推高了生产成本，威胁到该行业1000亿美元的出口目标。

title: 22,000 students told to pay back 'mis-sold' maintenance loans
summary: Over 22,000 students have been notified they must repay maintenance and childcare loans because their courses were never eligible for such funding.
content: Those affected have been told their courses were never eligible for maintenance or childcare loans

zh.title: 2.2万名学生被要求偿还"错误推销"的维持贷款
zh.summary: 超过2.2万名学生已被通知，由于其课程从未符合此类贷款的资格，他们必须偿还维持和托儿贷款。
